creator: ksmakoto@dd.iij4u.or.jp
text:
cad/spice cause internal error and SEGV.

$ cat sample_bug.spice
sample of bug
V0 1 0 1
.TRAN 1 10
.PRINT TRAN v(1, 0)
.END

$ spice3 -b sample_bug.spice

Circuit: sample of bug


internal error -- segmentation violation

Fix: 

This is workaround.

$ cat sample_nobug.spice
sample of no bug
V0 1 0 1
.TRAN 1 10
.PRINT TRAN v(1,0)
.END
How-To-Repeat: $ cat sample_bug.spice
sample of bug
V0 1 0 1
.TRAN 1 10
.PRINT TRAN v(1, 0)
.END

$ spice3 -b sample_bug.spice

Circuit: sample of bug


internal error -- segmentation violation
